message:
test(sdk/streaming): add EventStreamManager edge case tests for TopicState, ack, and cursor handling

Additional unit tests for the streaming SDK's EventStreamManager covering:
- TopicState: emit_with_seq behind next_seq does not advance auto-sequence
- Pre-set cursor preservation through record()
- Ack of non-pending sequences returns Missing error
- Various EventEnvelope builder and lifecycle edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
